form.trust_text: HubSpot Solutions Partner. 30+ years in ecommerce. Zero fluff.

seo.title: SEO Content Refresh Services - Content Cucumber
seo.meta_description: Refresh and re-optimize your existing content for better rankings. We audit, rewrite, and update pages with the highest ranking potential.

data.title:
SEO Content Refresh
Better Rankings From What You Already Have
paragraphs: Sometimes the highest-ROI SEO work is improving existing content. We find your pages with the most potential and make them perform.

data.title: What We Do
data.subtitle: Content refresh is faster and cheaper than creating from scratch, and it preserves the link equity your existing pages have already built.

items.title: Content Audit
items.text: We analyze every page on your site for ranking potential. Which pages are close to page one? Which have declining traffic? Which target outdated keywords?

items.title: Rewrite & Re-optimize
items.text: Update statistics, refresh examples, improve heading structure, add internal links, and rewrite sections that don't match current search intent.

items.title: Keyword Realignment
items.text: Search intent evolves. We realign your content to match what searchers want today, not what they wanted when the page was written.

items.title: Internal Link Restructuring
items.text: Strengthen your internal link architecture. Connect refreshed pages to new content, update broken links, and distribute page authority where it matters.

steps.title: Audit Existing Content
steps.text: We analyze your entire content library: rankings, traffic trends, backlink profiles, and search intent alignment. Identify which pages have the highest potential for improvement.

steps.title: Prioritize by Impact
steps.text: Not every page is worth refreshing. We prioritize by ranking proximity (pages on page 2-3), traffic decline severity, and business value of the target keywords.

steps.title: Refresh & Republish
steps.text: Our writers update the content: new data, better structure, stronger CTAs, improved readability. We keep the URL and preserve existing link equity.

steps.title: Track Results
steps.text: Monitor ranking changes, traffic recovery, and conversion impact. Content refreshes typically show results within 2-4 weeks as Google recrawls the updated pages.

items.question: When should I refresh content vs. write new content?
items.answer: Refresh when you have pages that used to rank but slipped, pages ranking on page 2-3 that need a push, or content with good backlinks but outdated information. Write new when you're targeting keywords you have no content for.

items.question: Will refreshing content hurt my existing rankings?
items.answer: No, when done correctly. We keep the same URL, preserve the core topic, and enhance the content. Google rewards updated, comprehensive content. We've never seen a properly refreshed page lose rankings.

items.question: How many pages can you refresh per month?
items.answer: Typically 5-15 pages per month depending on the scope of updates needed. Some pages need a light touch (updated stats, new internal links). Others need a full rewrite. We adjust based on what each page needs.

items.question: How quickly do refreshed pages see results?
items.answer: Most refreshed pages see ranking movement within 2-4 weeks. Pages that were already close to page one often jump the fastest. The full impact compounds over 1-3 months.

data.title: What's Your Best Content Not Doing?
data.text: Find the pages with the most untapped potential. Our content audit shows you exactly where to focus for the fastest ranking improvements.
